    164 +            file_hash         TEXT,
    165 +            {_LEGACY_PLAN_MATERIALIZED_HASH_COLUMN} TEXT,
    166 +            materialized_path TEXT NOT NULL,
    167 +            revision_count    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    168 +            sync_state        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'synced' CHECK (sync_state IN
    169 +                              ('synced','missing_file','orphan_file','parse_error','{_LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_STATE}')),
    170 +            {_LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_COLUMN} TEXT,
    171 +            parse_error       TEXT
    172          )
        ⋮
    175      conn.execute(
    173 -        """
    176 +        f"""
    177          INSERT INTO plans (
    178              name, status, created_at, updated_at, body, frontmatter_json,
    176 -            body_hash, file_hash, last_materialized_hash, materialized_path,
    177 -            revision_count, sync_state, conflict_reason, parse_error
    179 +            body_hash, file_hash, {_LEGACY_PLAN_MATERIALIZED_HASH_COLUMN}, materialized_path,
    180 +            revision_count, sync_state, {_LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_COLUMN}, parse_error
    181          ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        ⋮
    194              2,
    192 -            "conflict",
    195 +            _LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_STATE,
    196              "stale conflict",
        ⋮
    213      assert row["sync_state"] == "synced"
    211 -    assert "last_materialized_hash" not in columns
    212 -    assert "conflict_reason" not in columns
    213 -    assert "last_materialized_hash" not in sql
    214 -    assert "conflict_reason" not in sql
    214 +    assert _LEGACY_PLAN_MATERIALIZED_HASH_COLUMN not in columns

• Working (4m 58s • esc to interrupt)


› Find and fix a bug in @filename
